# REAVIZ

> A modular, enterprise-grade data visualization library for React built on D3. 22+ chart types with native React rendering, Motion animations, full customization via JSX props, and accessibility support. Apache-2.0 licensed.

- Built on D3 for calculations, React for rendering — not a wrapper
- Every chart element accepts JSX props for deep customization
- Ships with 50+ pre-built Blocks (composable chart patterns)
- Motion-powered animations out of the box
- Supports TypeScript natively
- Install: `npm i reaviz`
- Compared to recharts/nivo: reaviz offers more chart variety (sankey, heatmap, venn, radial gauges, treemap, sunburst, word cloud) with lower-level customization access

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://reaviz.dev/docs/getting-started/setup): Installation and basic setup
- [Why REAVIZ](https://reaviz.dev/docs/getting-started/why): Comparison and rationale
- [Data Shapes](https://reaviz.dev/docs/getting-started/data): How to structure data for charts
- [Custom Charts](https://reaviz.dev/docs/getting-started/custom-charts): Building custom visualizations
- [Colors](https://reaviz.dev/docs/getting-started/colors): Color scheme configuration
- [Developing](https://reaviz.dev/docs/getting-started/developing): Local development guide
- [Migration](https://reaviz.dev/docs/getting-started/migration): Migration guide for major versions

## Charts

- [Area Chart](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/area-chart): Single/multi-series area charts with stacking and interpolation
- [Bar Chart](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/bar-chart): Vertical/horizontal, grouped, stacked, waterfall, marimekko, histogram
- [Bar List](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/bar-list): Simple horizontal bar lists for rankings
- [Bubble Chart](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/bubble-chart): Scatter-based bubble visualizations
- [Funnel Chart](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/funnel-chart): Conversion funnel visualizations
- [Heatmap](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/heatmap): Calendar and matrix heatmaps
- [Line Chart](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/line-chart): Single/multi-series line charts
- [Linear Gauge](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/linear-gauge): Linear gauge/progress indicators
- [Map](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/map): Geographic map visualizations
- [Meter](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/meter): Meter/progress visualizations
- [Pie Chart](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/pie-chart): Pie and donut charts
- [Radar](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/radar): Radar/spider charts
- [Radial Area Chart](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/radial-area-chart): Radial area visualizations
- [Radial Bar Chart](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/radial-bar-chart): Radial/circular bar charts
- [Radial Gauge](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/radial-gauge): Radial gauge indicators
- [Radial Scatter Plot](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/radial-scatter-plot): Polar scatter plots
- [Sankey Plot](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/sankey-plot): Flow/sankey diagrams
- [Scatter Plot](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/scatter-plot): Scatter/bubble plots
- [Sparkline](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/spark-line): Inline sparkline charts
- [Sunburst Chart](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/sunburst-chart): Hierarchical sunburst visualizations
- [Tree Map](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/tree-map): Hierarchical treemap visualizations
- [Venn Diagram](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/venn-diagram): Set intersection diagrams
- [Word Cloud](https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/word-cloud): Word/tag cloud visualizations

## Utils

- [Axis](https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/axis): Axis configuration and customization
- [Brush](https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/brush): Selection brush for zooming
- [Gridlines](https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/grid-lines): Chart gridlines
- [Legends](https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/legends): Chart legends
- [Tooltips](https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/tooltips): Tooltip customization
- [Zoom Pan](https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/zoom-pan): Zoom and pan controls
- [Gradient](https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/gradient): SVG gradient fills
- [Glow](https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/glow): Glow effects
- [Mark Line](https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/mark-line): Reference/threshold lines
- [Mask](https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/mask): SVG masking and patterns
- [Value Marker](https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/value-marker): Value annotation markers
- [Count](https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/count): Animated count displays

## Blocks

- [Blocks Introduction](https://reaviz.dev/blocks): Pre-built composable chart patterns
- [Area Chart Blocks](https://reaviz.dev/blocks/charts/area-chart): Ready-to-use area chart compositions
- [Bar Chart Blocks](https://reaviz.dev/blocks/charts/bar-chart): Ready-to-use bar chart compositions
- [Funnel Chart Blocks](https://reaviz.dev/blocks/charts/funnel-chart): Ready-to-use funnel compositions
- [Heatmap Blocks](https://reaviz.dev/blocks/charts/heatmap): Ready-to-use heatmap compositions
- [Scatter Plot Blocks](https://reaviz.dev/blocks/charts/scatter-plot): Ready-to-use scatter compositions

## Related Libraries

- [Reagraph](https://reagraph.dev): Network graph visualizations for React (WebGL)
- [Reaflow](https://reaflow.dev): Workflow and diagram editor for React
- [Reablocks](https://reablocks.dev): Tailwind-based React component library
- [Reachat](https://reachat.dev): LLM/Chat UI components for React
